sections.title: Strategic Context
sections.description: Why this project exists — the business problem, strategic driver, and what changes if it succeeds.
required_content: Problem statement — current state pain and cost of inaction
Strategic alignment — how this supports broader business goals
Expected outcomes with measurable success criteria

sections.title: Stakeholders & Governance
sections.description: Who is involved, who decides, and how the project is governed.
required_content: Impacted teams and change management considerations
Governance model — how decisions are made and escalated

sections.title: Risks & Compliance
sections.description: Key risks, regulatory constraints, data sensitivity, and mitigation approach.
required_content: Top 3–5 risks with likelihood and impact rating

sections.title: Recommendation & Build Path
sections.description: Go/No-Go rationale and how the solution will be built.
required_content: Build path per agent: Fabricate / Custom / Workflow tool
